exercises.title: Link Protocol Simulator
exercises.description: Simulate and compare link-level entanglement generation protocols.
hints: DLCZ has lower success rate but simpler setup
Midpoint BSM needs photons from both sides

exercises.title: Quantum Routing Engine
exercises.description: Build a quantum routing engine that considers fidelity constraints.
tasks: Calculate path fidelity including swapping loss
Find optimal path for given requirements
hints: May need to reject requests if no valid path

exercises.title: Swapping Coordinator
exercises.description: Coordinate entanglement swapping across a multi-hop path.
tasks: Schedule swap operations for a path
hints: All links must succeed before swapping
Parallel swapping is faster but more complex
Must track which pairs to swap at each node
Failure at any point may require restart

exercises.title: QKD Protocol Implementation
exercises.description: Implement E91 QKD protocol using network entanglement.
tasks: Calculate QBER and secure key rate
hints: Use CHSH inequality for security check
